description: Benchmark dataset for evaluating Hypothetica pipeline against Google Patents literature. 40 cases across 4 domains with originality labels and gold-standard patent sets.

cases.idea: A hardware-software co-design for on-device federated learning where a custom neuromorphic chip tile performs local gradient computation in the analog domain, and only digital spike-encoded gradient summaries are transmitted to the aggregation server.

gold_patents.title: Neuromorphic computing architectures for machine learning
Federated machine learning with privacy-preserving gradient aggregation
Analog in-memory computing for neural network training
Spike-encoded gradient communication for distributed learning

cases.rationale: Combining analog neuromorphic gradient computation with spike-encoded transmission specifically in a federated learning aggregation context is not covered by existing patents on either neuromorphic ML or federated learning independently.

cases.idea: A patent-protected method for real-time personalization of large language model outputs at inference time using a user-specific compressed context vector stored on-device, injected as a soft prompt prefix without any server-side fine-tuning.

gold_patents.title: Personalized language model adaptation using user interaction history
On-device model personalization with privacy-preserving user embeddings
Soft prompt tuning for large language models
Compressed user representation for inference-time model conditioning

cases.rationale: On-device compressed context vectors injected as soft prompt prefixes for inference-time LLM personalization without server fine-tuning is a novel system architecture not captured in existing prompt-tuning or on-device personalization patents.

cases.idea: A machine learning pipeline for video recommendation that uses causal inference to decompose a user's engagement signal into preference-driven and context-driven components, using only the preference component for training to reduce spurious correlations from browsing context.

gold_patents.title: Causal modeling for debiased recommendation systems
Context-aware video recommendation with multi-signal user modeling
Counterfactual learning for unbiased content ranking
Separating intent from context in user engagement modeling

cases.rationale: Explicitly decomposing engagement into preference-driven vs. context-driven components via causal inference and using only the causal component for training is a novel debiasing architecture.

cases.idea: A method for accelerating transformer inference on mobile devices by quantizing only the attention score computation to INT4 while keeping value projections and feedforward layers at INT8, based on sensitivity analysis.

gold_patents.title: Mixed-precision quantization for neural network inference
Layer-wise quantization of transformer models for edge deployment
INT4 quantization techniques for large language models on mobile hardware
Sensitivity-guided neural network compression

cases.rationale: Attention-specific INT4 quantization is a granular variant of well-patented mixed-precision quantization; the sensitivity-guided layer selection principle is covered in existing compression patents.

cases.idea: A data augmentation method for training object detection models in low-resource settings that uses a generative diffusion model conditioned on class labels to synthesize additional training images, then filters synthetic images by an ensemble confidence threshold.

gold_patents.title: Synthetic data generation using generative adversarial networks for object detection
Diffusion model-based image synthesis for training data augmentation
Quality filtering of synthetic training data using classifier confidence
Few-shot object detection with generative data augmentation

cases.rationale: Diffusion-based augmentation with confidence-based filtering is a combination of two well-covered ideas; the novelty over existing patents is minor.

cases.idea: Incorporating a fairness constraint into a gradient boosting training procedure that penalizes predictions where the model's output distribution diverges statistically between protected demographic groups, applied to credit scoring.

gold_patents.title: Fairness-constrained machine learning for financial decision systems
Bias mitigation in gradient boosted decision trees
Statistical parity constraints for credit scoring models
Constrained optimization for demographically fair ML predictions

cases.rationale: Fairness-penalized gradient boosting for credit scoring is well-covered by existing fintech ML patents; the demographic parity constraint in credit models is explicitly patented.

cases.idea: A system and method for detecting anomalies in time-series sensor data from industrial equipment using an autoencoder trained on normal operating data, where reconstruction error above a threshold triggers a maintenance alert.

gold_patents.title: Autoencoder-based anomaly detection for industrial IoT sensor streams
Predictive maintenance using reconstruction error thresholding
Deep learning for unsupervised industrial fault detection
Unsupervised anomaly detection in manufacturing time series

cases.rationale: Autoencoder reconstruction error for industrial predictive maintenance is one of the most filed ML-for-IoT patent categories; the exact mechanism is covered.

cases.idea: A natural language processing system for customer support that classifies incoming user messages by intent category using a fine-tuned BERT model, then routes the message to the appropriate department based on the predicted intent.

gold_patents.title: Intent classification for customer service routing using BERT
Neural intent detection for conversational AI routing systems
Transformer-based message classification and automated routing
Customer support automation with deep learning intent recognition

cases.rationale: BERT intent classification for customer service routing is a canonical NLP product patent; multiple assignees (Google, Amazon, Salesforce, IBM) hold overlapping patents in this exact space.

cases.idea: A speech recognition system that uses a recurrent neural network language model to rescore hypotheses from an acoustic model, improving word error rate by incorporating broader linguistic context.

gold_patents.title: Neural language model rescoring for improved speech recognition
RNN-LM integration with acoustic model for ASR systems
Hybrid acoustic-language model decoding for voice assistants
Lattice rescoring with neural language models

cases.rationale: RNN-LM rescoring in ASR is a foundational published technique (Mikolov et al. 2010) and is extensively patented by all major voice assistant companies.

cases.idea: A learning-to-rank method for scientific paper recommendations that uses citation graph topology as an auxiliary supervision signal — papers frequently co-cited together are treated as positive pairs, and papers never co-cited are negatives — without requiring explicit user interaction data.

gold_patents.title: Citation graph-based document retrieval and ranking
Self-supervised scientific content recommendation using co-citation signals
Graph-based ranking for academic search without user logs
Contrastive learning for document representation using citation structure

cases.rationale: Using co-citation topology as the sole supervision signal for learning-to-rank scientific documents — bypassing user interaction data — is a novel supervision paradigm for recommendation without engagement logs.

cases.idea: A hardware security module that uses a physically unclonable function (PUF) response as a seed for a real-time key derivation function, where the derived key is re-generated fresh per session by re-challenging the PUF with a session-specific nonce, eliminating stored key material.

gold_patents.title: Physical unclonable function for secure key generation
PUF-based session key derivation without persistent key storage
Nonce-seeded PUF authentication protocol
Ephemeral key generation using hardware entropy sources

cases.rationale: Session-specific nonce re-challenging of a PUF for per-session fresh key derivation that eliminates stored key material entirely is a novel security architecture not present in existing PUF key-storage patents.

cases.idea: An active honeypot system that uses a reinforcement learning agent to dynamically adapt the fake vulnerability profile presented to an attacker based on the attacker's observed probe sequence, maximizing attacker dwell time and intelligence collection.

gold_patents.title: Adaptive honeypot deception system for cyber threat intelligence
Dynamic deception environment using machine learning for attacker profiling
Reinforcement learning for cyber deception and honeypot management
Automated vulnerability presentation for cyber deception systems

cases.rationale: RL-driven real-time adaptation of fake vulnerability profiles in response to observed attacker probe sequences — as a dynamic deception strategy — is not covered in existing honeypot or cyber deception patents.

cases.idea: A zero-trust network access control system that continuously re-evaluates device trust scores using behavioral biometrics (typing cadence, mouse dynamics) captured passively during a session, revoking access when the trust score drops below a threshold without requiring re-authentication.

gold_patents.title: Continuous authentication using behavioral biometrics for zero-trust access
Dynamic session trust scoring with passive biometric signals
Zero trust architecture with continuous device posture assessment
Silent re-authentication via behavioral anomaly detection in enterprise networks

cases.rationale: Passive behavioral biometrics as the continuous trust signal specifically within a zero-trust policy engine — with threshold-based session revocation — is novel; existing patents address ZTA and behavioral biometrics separately.

cases.idea: A method for detecting malicious PowerShell scripts by converting script tokens into an embedding sequence and running them through a transformer encoder trained on a labeled corpus of benign and malicious scripts.

gold_patents.title: Transformer-based malicious script detection system
Token embedding models for PowerShell malware classification
Deep learning for scripting language threat detection in endpoint security
NLP-based static analysis of malicious command interpreters

cases.rationale: Transformer-based PowerShell malware detection via token embeddings is well-covered in endpoint security patents; the approach follows directly from existing NLP-for-malware detection systems.

cases.idea: A federated learning system for threat intelligence sharing across enterprise organizations where each participant trains a local intrusion detection model and only shares encrypted model updates using homomorphic encryption.

gold_patents.title: Privacy-preserving federated threat intelligence with homomorphic encryption
Encrypted gradient aggregation for federated cybersecurity models
Federated learning for enterprise intrusion detection without data sharing
Secure multi-party learning for collaborative cyber defense

cases.rationale: Federated threat intelligence with HE-encrypted updates is explicitly patented; the combination of FL + HE for collaborative IDS is covered.

cases.idea: A secure multi-party computation protocol for privacy-preserving credit risk assessment where multiple financial institutions contribute encrypted feature vectors without revealing raw customer data, and a joint model outputs a risk score.

gold_patents.title: Secure multi-party computation for financial risk scoring
Privacy-preserving collaborative credit assessment using MPC
Federated credit scoring without raw data exposure
Encrypted feature aggregation for financial institution ML collaboration

cases.rationale: MPC-based privacy-preserving credit scoring is an active patent filing area among fintech and banking institutions; multiple overlapping patents exist.

cases.idea: A system for detecting phishing emails by analyzing URL features, sender reputation, and email body text using a machine learning classifier, flagging suspicious messages before delivery to the end user.

gold_patents.title: Multi-signal phishing email detection using machine learning
URL and sender analysis for pre-delivery email threat classification
Email security gateway with ML-based phishing detection
Real-time email filtering using ensemble threat classifiers

cases.rationale: Multi-signal (URL + sender + body) ML phishing detection is one of the most densely filed email security patent categories; covered by Proofpoint, Mimecast, Google, Microsoft, and others.

cases.idea: A network traffic encryption detection system that identifies whether a TLS-encrypted connection carries malicious content by analyzing connection metadata (packet timing, size distribution, handshake parameters) without decrypting the payload.

gold_patents.title: Encrypted traffic analysis for malware detection without decryption
TLS metadata analysis for network threat detection
Machine learning for malicious encrypted connection classification
Behavioral analysis of encrypted sessions via flow statistics

cases.rationale: Encrypted traffic classification via metadata and flow statistics (without payload inspection) is a heavily patented Cisco/VMware/Palo Alto Networks domain.

cases.idea: A mobile device management system that detects jailbroken or rooted devices by checking for the presence of unauthorized system files and processes at login, and blocks enterprise application access from non-compliant devices.

gold_patents.title: Device integrity verification and compliance enforcement for MDM
Root and jailbreak detection system for enterprise mobile access control
File system and process analysis for mobile device compromise detection
Continuous device compliance monitoring for zero trust mobile security

cases.rationale: Jailbreak/root detection for enterprise MDM access control is foundational mobile security IP held by MobileIron, VMware Workspace ONE, Microsoft Intune, and others.

cases.idea: A method for detecting ransomware on endpoint devices by monitoring file system activity for sudden high-volume file rename and encryption patterns, triggering an alert and process suspension when anomalous behavior is detected.

gold_patents.title: Ransomware detection via file system entropy and rename rate monitoring
Endpoint protection using behavioral heuristics for ransomware identification
Real-time ransomware mitigation through process suspension on anomaly detection
File access pattern analysis for ransomware early warning systems

cases.rationale: File entropy + rename rate monitoring for ransomware detection and process suspension is core endpoint security IP, filed by CrowdStrike, SentinelOne, Sophos, and others.

cases.idea: A method for fabricating self-healing polymer composites where microvascular networks are 3D-printed into a thermoset matrix using a sacrificial wax template, and a two-part healing agent is stored in separate channel sets that mix at the damage site upon vascular rupture.

gold_patents.title: Microvascular network fabrication in polymer composites for autonomic healing
3D-printed sacrificial template for internal channel formation in thermoset matrices
Dual-channel self-healing composite with separated reactive healing agents
Autonomous structural repair systems using embedded vascular architectures

cases.rationale: The specific combination of 3D-printed sacrificial wax templating with dual-channel separated healing agent delivery in a thermoset matrix — as a unified fabrication process — is not covered in existing vascular self-healing patents.

cases.idea: A solid-state electrolyte material for lithium-ion batteries composed of a lithium-conducting garnet phase co-sintered with a polymer matrix to form a flexible ceramic-polymer composite membrane that maintains ionic conductivity under mechanical deformation.

gold_patents.title: Garnet-polymer composite solid electrolyte for flexible battery applications
Co-sintering process for ceramic-polymer electrolyte membrane fabrication
Mechanically flexible solid-state electrolyte with maintained ionic conductivity
Garnet-phase lithium conductor integration in composite battery separators

cases.rationale: Co-sintering garnet with a polymer to create a flexible composite that retains the ionic conductivity of the ceramic phase under deformation is a novel materials processing approach.

cases.idea: A process for producing hydrogen through photocatalytic water splitting using a bismuth vanadate photoanode decorated with single-atom platinum co-catalysts anchored via atomic layer deposition, achieving both visible-light absorption and efficient charge transfer.

gold_patents.title: Single-atom platinum co-catalyst on metal oxide photoanodes for water splitting
Atomic layer deposition of noble metal single atoms on photocatalytic substrates
Bismuth vanadate photoanode engineering for solar hydrogen production
Visible-light photocatalysis with single-atom charge transfer promoters

cases.rationale: ALD-anchored single-atom Pt on BiVO4 for combined visible-light absorption and charge transfer enhancement is a specific material-process combination not fully covered by existing ALD or BiVO4 photocatalysis patents separately.

cases.idea: A method for improving the thermal conductivity of epoxy adhesives used in electronics packaging by incorporating boron nitride nanoplatelets functionalized with silane coupling agents to improve interfacial adhesion with the polymer matrix.

gold_patents.title: Boron nitride nanoplatelet-filled polymer composites for thermal management
Silane functionalization of hexagonal boron nitride for enhanced polymer compatibility
High thermal conductivity epoxy composites for electronic packaging
Surface treatment of BN fillers for thermal interface materials

cases.rationale: Silane-functionalized BN nanoplatelets in epoxy for improved thermal conductivity is a well-covered area in thermal interface material patents; the combination of approaches is incremental.

cases.idea: A transparent conducting oxide coating deposited by reactive magnetron sputtering that uses a zinc oxide target with aluminum doping to produce AZO thin films with resistivity below 10^-3 ohm-cm for use in thin-film solar cell front contacts.

gold_patents.title: Aluminum-doped zinc oxide transparent conducting films by reactive sputtering
Low-resistivity AZO deposition for photovoltaic front electrode applications
Process optimization for high-conductivity transparent oxide electrodes
Reactive sputtering parameters for TCO thin film solar cell contacts

cases.rationale: AZO by reactive magnetron sputtering for solar cell front contacts is a well-established TCO process; the specific resistivity target is an optimization of known material-process combinations.

cases.idea: A method of improving the fatigue life of additively manufactured Ti-6Al-4V aerospace components by applying a post-build hot isostatic pressing cycle followed by a targeted laser shock peening treatment on stress-concentration surfaces.

gold_patents.title: Post-processing of additive manufactured titanium alloys for fatigue improvement
Hot isostatic pressing for porosity reduction in AM metallic components
Laser shock peening of titanium components for surface residual stress enhancement
Combined thermal and mechanical post-processing for AM aerospace parts

cases.rationale: HIP + laser shock peening as a combined post-processing sequence for AM Ti-6Al-4V is a logical combination of individually well-patented processes; the combination is incremental.

cases.idea: A lithium iron phosphate cathode material with a carbon coating applied via chemical vapor deposition to improve electronic conductivity while preserving structural stability during cycling in lithium-ion batteries.

gold_patents.title: Carbon-coated LiFePO4 cathode materials with enhanced electronic conductivity
CVD carbon coating process for olivine-phase battery cathode particles
Surface carbon modification of LFP for improved rate capability
Coating methods for stabilizing LiFePO4 cathode in rechargeable cells

cases.rationale: Carbon-coated LFP is a commercialized battery material with decades of patent history; CVD carbon coating on LFP is explicitly covered in numerous foundational and improvement patents.

cases.idea: A superhydrophobic surface coating for corrosion protection of steel structures, created by depositing a hierarchical micro-nano texture followed by a low surface energy fluoropolymer treatment.

gold_patents.title: Hierarchical surface texture with fluoropolymer treatment for superhydrophobicity
Superhydrophobic anti-corrosion coatings for metal substrates
Micro-nano structured surfaces with self-cleaning and corrosion protection properties
Low surface energy fluoropolymer coatings for steel corrosion inhibition

cases.rationale: Hierarchical micro-nano texture plus fluoropolymer for superhydrophobic corrosion protection on steel is extensively covered in surface coating patents from multiple industrial applicants.

cases.idea: A perovskite solar cell with a methylammonium lead iodide absorber layer, an electron transport layer of TiO2, and a hole transport layer of spiro-OMeTAD, achieving power conversion efficiency above 20%.

gold_patents.title: Methylammonium lead halide perovskite photovoltaic devices
TiO2 electron transport and spiro-OMeTAD hole transport perovskite solar cell
High efficiency perovskite solar cells with optimized charge transport layers
MAPbI3-based perovskite cells with planar heterojunction architecture

cases.rationale: MAPbI3/TiO2/spiro-OMeTAD is the canonical perovskite solar cell stack, extensively covered in the seminal 2012-2014 patents and all subsequent improvement filings.

cases.idea: A method for producing graphene oxide from natural graphite using a modified Hummers' method, followed by chemical reduction to produce reduced graphene oxide sheets for use as conductive filler in polymer nanocomposites.

gold_patents.title: Modified Hummers process for scalable graphene oxide synthesis
Chemical reduction of graphene oxide for conductive nanocomposite applications
rGO production and polymer composite fabrication methods
Graphene oxide synthesis with controlled oxidation degree for material property tuning

cases.rationale: GO/rGO synthesis from graphite via modified Hummers for polymer composites is one of the most-patented and most-published materials procedures; completely covered.

cases.idea: An implantable biosensor that measures intratumoral pH and glucose concentrations in real time using a dual-analyte electrochemical sensor array, wirelessly transmitting data to an external reader via near-field communication to guide adaptive chemotherapy dosing.

gold_patents.title: Implantable electrochemical sensor for tumor microenvironment monitoring
Wireless NFC-enabled biosensor for continuous intratumoral metabolite measurement
Closed-loop chemotherapy dose adjustment system using real-time biomarker feedback
Dual-analyte implantable sensor for pH and glucose in oncology applications

cases.rationale: The closed-loop system combining dual-analyte (pH + glucose) intratumoral sensing with NFC transmission and adaptive chemotherapy dosing adjustment is not found as a unified system in existing patent literature.

cases.idea: A microfluidic organ-on-chip platform that recapitulates the gut-liver axis by connecting a gut epithelial chamber and a liver sinusoid chamber with a shared perfusion channel, enabling toxicological screening of oral drug candidates with first-pass metabolism modeling.

gold_patents.title: Multi-organ microfluidic platform for drug toxicity screening
Gut-liver axis organ-on-chip with interconnected perfusion for pharmacokinetic modeling
Liver sinusoid microphysiological system for first-pass metabolism studies
Integrated intestinal and hepatic tissue co-culture device for oral drug assessment

cases.rationale: A gut-liver axis OoC with a shared perfusion channel specifically designed for first-pass metabolism modeling of oral drugs is a distinct system configuration not fully covered by single-organ OoC or general multi-organ platform patents.

cases.idea: A wearable patch that continuously measures cortisol levels in sweat using a molecularly imprinted polymer recognition element integrated with an electrochemical transducer, providing real-time stress biomarker monitoring without blood draws.

gold_patents.title: Sweat-based cortisol sensing wearable device for stress monitoring
Molecularly imprinted polymer biosensor for electrochemical hormone detection
Non-invasive wearable patch for continuous stress biomarker analysis
Real-time cortisol measurement in perspiration using electrochemical transduction

cases.rationale: Integrating a molecularly imprinted polymer recognition layer with an electrochemical transducer in a wearable sweat patch specifically for continuous real-time cortisol monitoring is a novel biosensor architecture.

cases.idea: A CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing system delivered via lipid nanoparticles for correcting a specific point mutation in the HBB gene responsible for sickle cell disease, tested in ex vivo hematopoietic stem cell editing followed by autologous transplantation.

gold_patents.title: CRISPR-Cas9 lipid nanoparticle delivery for hemoglobin gene correction
Ex vivo hematopoietic stem cell editing for sickle cell disease treatment
LNP-formulated CRISPR components for point mutation repair in blood disorders
Autologous transplantation of gene-corrected HSCs for hemoglobinopathy therapy

cases.rationale: LNP-delivered CRISPR for HBB correction in HSCs with autologous transplant is a clinical-stage approach covered by Vertex/CRISPR Therapeutics and competing patent families.

cases.idea: A retinal prosthesis that uses a subretinal photovoltaic array powered wirelessly by near-infrared light, where each pixel independently drives local bipolar cell stimulation without an external power cable.

gold_patents.title: Subretinal photovoltaic prosthesis for vision restoration
Wireless NIR-powered subretinal implant with pixel-local stimulation
Photovoltaic array for bipolar cell stimulation in retinal degeneration
Cable-free retinal prosthesis powered by external infrared illumination

cases.rationale: NIR-powered subretinal photovoltaic prosthesis with per-pixel local stimulation is the core Stanford Photovoltaic Retinal Prosthesis (PRIMA) technology, extensively patented.

cases.idea: A hydrogel wound dressing incorporating antimicrobial silver nanoparticles and a controlled-release reservoir of epidermal growth factor, providing simultaneous infection prevention and regenerative signaling at the wound site.

gold_patents.title: Silver nanoparticle-loaded antimicrobial hydrogel wound dressing
EGF-releasing hydrogel scaffold for accelerated wound healing
Dual-function wound dressing with antimicrobial and growth factor delivery
Composite hydrogel dressings for combined infection control and tissue regeneration

cases.rationale: Combined Ag-NP + EGF hydrogel wound dressings are directly covered in dual-function wound healing patents; the combination is commercially and academically well-explored.

cases.idea: A deep brain stimulation device with adaptive closed-loop control that adjusts stimulation parameters in real time based on local field potential biomarkers recorded from the same implanted electrode array used for stimulation.

gold_patents.title: Closed-loop deep brain stimulation with LFP biomarker feedback control
Adaptive DBS system using sensing and stimulation on shared electrode contacts
Neural biomarker-driven parameter adaptation in neuromodulation devices
Simultaneous neural recording and stimulation for closed-loop therapy

cases.rationale: Adaptive closed-loop DBS using LFP biomarkers from the stimulating electrode is a core Medtronic/Abbott patent family covering their commercial aDBS products.

cases.idea: A continuous glucose monitoring system using a subcutaneous electrochemical sensor with a glucose oxidase enzyme layer and a biocompatible membrane that reduces sensor drift, transmitting readings wirelessly to a smartphone app every five minutes.

gold_patents.title: Subcutaneous CGM sensor with enzymatic glucose oxidase transducer
Biocompatible membrane-stabilized continuous glucose sensor with wireless data transmission
Drift compensation algorithms for enzymatic electrochemical CGM devices
Mobile-connected CGM system with real-time glucose display and alert

cases.rationale: This is the exact architecture of Dexcom, Abbott FreeStyle Libre, and Medtronic CGM systems — among the most densely patented medical device categories in existence.

cases.idea: A magnetic resonance imaging contrast agent consisting of superparamagnetic iron oxide nanoparticles coated with dextran for biocompatibility, used for enhanced tumor visualization through passive EPR-effect accumulation.

gold_patents.title: Dextran-coated SPION contrast agents for MRI tumor imaging
Superparamagnetic iron oxide nanoparticles for passive tumor targeting via EPR
Polymer-coated iron oxide nanoparticles for biocompatible MRI contrast enhancement
SPION synthesis and surface functionalization for medical imaging applications

cases.rationale: Dextran-coated SPION MRI contrast agents are a commercialized, FDA-approved class (Feridex, Resovist); the EPR-based tumor accumulation mechanism is foundational IP from the 1990s.

cases.idea: A cochlear implant system with 22 intracochlear electrode contacts that delivers frequency-mapped electrical stimulation patterns derived from an external microphone and sound processor, restoring hearing in patients with profound sensorineural hearing loss.

gold_patents.title: Multi-channel cochlear implant with tonotopic frequency mapping
Cochlear electrode array with external sound processor and wireless transmission
Signal processing algorithms for cochlear implant speech intelligibility
Sensorineural hearing restoration via electrical stimulation of auditory nerve

cases.rationale: Multi-channel cochlear implants are among the earliest and most mature medical device patent estates (Cochlear Ltd., Advanced Bionics, MED-EL); the described system is a textbook cochlear implant.
